message:
test(e2e): add 9 multi-protocol integration tests (bd-32ot)

Exercise HTTP + gRPC + WebSocket + runtime together: shared runtime
constructs, auth pipeline, codec interleaving, pool + compression,
concurrent ops (100 iterations), timer-driven timeouts, graceful
shutdown across 4 protocol regions, metadata correlation, and stress
test (200 iterations across all protocols).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
